text: A street scene in an urban area under a cloudy sky. A large, dark, rectangular billboard structure dominates the left side of the frame, supported by red poles. Several streetlights are attached to the structure. Below the billboard, a white van and other vehicles are visible, along with pedestrians. To the right, there is a multi-story building, utility poles, and construction cranes extending into the sky. Green trees are visible between the buildings and the billboard.
